description_long: This object is a medium-sized pumpkin with a smooth, rounded body and a prominent, twisted brown stem at the top. The pumpkin's surface is segmented with subtle vertical ridges, giving it a natural, organic appearance. The front face features a menacing carved expression, with sharply angled, almond-shaped eyes and a wide, jagged mouth that curves upward in a sinister grin. The carving style is traditional, reminiscent of classic Halloween jack-o'-lanterns, with deep cutouts for the eyes and mouth. The pumpkin's coloration is a warm orange, with the stem rendered in a contrasting dark brown. There are no visible accessories or additional decorations attached to the pumpkin.
description: A medium orange pumpkin with a twisted brown stem and a sinister, carved jack-o'-lantern face featuring sharp eyes and a jagged mouth.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carved face with sharp eyes and a wide, jagged mouth, as well as the full stem.
description_view_1: Rear three-quarter view highlighting the smooth, uncarved back and the top of the stem.
description_view_2: Direct rear view displaying the rounded, uncarved surface and the full stem.
description_view_3: Side view showing the pumpkin's profile, with one eye and part of the mouth carving visible, and the stem at the top.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern style with sharply angled, almond-shaped eyes and a wide, jagged, upturned mouth. The features are deeply cut, creating a sinister and expressive face.
